keyMappings:
unmapAll

map t scrollDown
map n scrollUp
map h scrollLeft
map s scrollRight
map H goBack
map S goForward
map N nextTab
map T previousTab

map gg scrollToTop
map G scrollToBottom



# map i enterInsertMode
# map gf toggleViewSource
# map zi zoomIn
# map zo zoomOut

map u LinkHints.activateMode
map U LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
map Y LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl
map y copyCurrentUrl

# map o Vomnibar.activate

map / enterFindMode
map * findSelected
map j performFind
map k performBackwardsFind
